title: Using Outlook Automations
excerpt: Has anyone found a workaround using Outlook email automations without using your personal email address?

posts.author: AAcosta3810 (Acosta)
posts.cookedHtml: Has anyone found a workaround using Outlook email automations without using your personal email address?

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
Use Microsoft 365 for your business email.

You can create (pay) for a service email account, use that, and then grant your account access to that mailbox.
